phase_0_inventory.note: 13 sources mapped: 5 archived PDFs, 1 Cloudflare-blocked moderngov Cabinet page (read via Wayback), 8 Tier-1 national datasets.

phase_1_archive.note: 5 PDFs sha256'd with _meta.json. Cabinet via Wayback (Cloudflare-blocked direct).

phase_1b_visual_evidence.note: 6 page-image PNGs at 150 DPI: SoA p17 budget narrative, p29 reserves, p85 senior officer remuneration, p112 council tax base, p130 CE name + Members' Allowances p8 rates.

phase_2_extract.note: extracted-values.json covers 11 fields (CE, salary, total remuneration, council tax base, GF balance, earmarked reserves, basic + leader + deputy + portfolio holder allowances, council leader).

phase_3_strip.note: Bradford strip-list applied. UI strip: two-tier explainer in YourBillCard re-applied (same precedent as Adur PR #118).

phase_3_5_tier1_drift.note: Population fix 118,800 → 124,937 (verbatim ONS Mid-2024). All other Tier-1 values match: council_tax_requirement 9,666,363 / council_tax_base 43,041.28 / reserves 4,232 (£'000) / capital_programme 21,083 (£'000) / total_councillors 48 / area band-d 2129/2210/2317/2424/2540/2645.

phase_3_6_tier4_personnel.note: CE: David Armiger (no change — confirmed via SoA + 2 live pages). LEADER: stripped → Cllr Julie A Leigh (Cabinet Cmt 147 Chair via Wayback). CABINET: empty → 8 members with verbatim portfolios (Leigh/Slater/Adams/Evans/Pulk/Rhodes/Scotthorne/Schuller).

phase_4_populate_field_sources.note: 12 field_sources entries with NORTH-STAR §4 schema (tier + extraction_method + sha256_at_access OR archive_exempt + page + excerpt + page_image_url where applicable).

phase_5_structural_validators.result: 0 errors. 5 pre-existing soft warnings (cabinet placeholder portfolio for Adams, councillors_url moderngov subdomain, RA budget cultural/other drift at edge of 10% tolerance, parish precepts gap).

phase_5b_live_ux_sweep.result: 0 / 0 violations (after stripping two-tier explainer in YourBillCard)

phase_5c_live_site_reality_check.result: 6 verbatim spot-checks all pass: chief_executive name, chief_executive_salary, council_tax_base 2024/25, GF reserves balance, basic allowance, leader allowance.

phase_5d_screenshot_parity.result: 4/4 verbatim-1:1, 0 mismatched, 0 missing PNG (after fixing CE-name page 129→130 + tightening allowance excerpts to verbatim substrings)

phase_6_document.note: docs/BASSETLAW-AUDIT.md (Datasheet for Datasets, 11 sections) + manifests/bassetlaw.json + status/bassetlaw.json (this file). councilChangelogData entry added in src/data/council-changelog-data.ts via the Adur SEO branch (PR #118).
